name: sast_deep_report
description: Source-only DEEP assessment: run sast_scan + triage, VERIFY each scanner finding (reachability), and independently HUNT the source for exploitable attack chains the scanners miss (sast_hunt_core), adversarially refute each hunter hypothesis, then merge both streams (dropping false positives) into one report.md + report.pdf + findings.json + report.sarif. No live target required.

inputParameters.queryExpression: . as $in | ($in.triage.findings // []) | to_entries | { forkTasks: map({ name: "sast_verify_agent", taskReferenceName: ("verify_" + (.key|tostring)), type: "SUB_WORKFLOW", optional: true, subWorkflowParam: {name:"sast_verify_agent", version:1} }), forkTasksInputs: (map({ key: ("verify_" + (.key|tostring)), value: { finding: .value, source_path: $in.source_path, max_steps: ($in.max_steps // 10) } }) | from_entries), count: length }

. as $in | ([ $in.join[]? | select(type=="object") ]) as $vals | ([ $vals[] | ((.finding // {}) as $f | (.conclusion // {}) as $c | ($f + { severity: ($c.severity // $f.severity // "Info"), false_positive: ((($c.verdict // "") == "false_positive") or ($f.false_positive // false)), verified: ($c.verdict // "not-run"), reachable: ($c.reachable // "unclear"), confidence: ($c.confidence // $f.confidence // "low"), verification: ($c.reasoning // ""), source_tool: "scanner" })) ]) as $f | { executive_summary: ($in.triage.executive_summary // ""), risk_rating: ($in.triage.risk_rating // ""), findings: $f }

. as $in | ($in.hypotheses // []) | to_entries | { forkTasks: map({ name: "sast_verify_agent", taskReferenceName: ("hv_" + (.key|tostring)), type: "SUB_WORKFLOW", optional: true, subWorkflowParam: {name:"sast_verify_agent", version:1} }), forkTasksInputs: (map({ key: ("hv_" + (.key|tostring)), value: { finding: { title: (.value.title // "?"), description: (.value.rationale // ""), location: (((.value.evidence // [])[0].file // "") + ":" + ((((.value.evidence // [])[0].line) // 0)|tostring)), evidence: ([ (.value.evidence // [])[] | (.file + ":" + ((.line // 0)|tostring) + "  " + (.snippet // "")) ] | join("\n")), severity_hint: (.value.severity // "Medium"), category: (.value.category // "other"), owasp: (.value.owasp // ""), source_tool: "hunter", hypothesis: .value }, source_path: $in.source_path, max_steps: ($in.max_steps // 10) } }) | from_entries), count: length }

. as $in | { findings: [ $in.join[]? | select(type=="object") | { f: (.finding // {}), c: (.conclusion // {}) } | select((.c.verdict // "uncertain") != "false_positive") | (.f.hypothesis // {}) as $h | { id: ($h.id // "H-hunt"), title: ($h.title // .f.title // "?"), severity: (.c.severity // $h.severity // .f.severity_hint // "Medium"), false_positive: false, confidence: (.c.confidence // $h.self_confidence // "low"), verified: (.c.verdict // "uncertain"), reachable: (.c.reachable // "unclear"), cwe: ($h.owasp // ""), owasp: ($h.owasp // ""), objective_id: ($h.objective_id // ""), location: (((($h.evidence // [])[0].file) // .f.location // "")), description: ($h.rationale // ""), evidence: (.f.evidence // ""), validation: (.c.reasoning // ""), remediation: "", test_plan: ($h.test_plan // []), expected_evidence: ($h.expected_evidence // ""), source_tool: "hunter" } ] }

. as $in | (((.scanner.findings // []) + (.hunter // []))) as $f | { executive_summary: (.scanner.executive_summary // ""), risk_rating: (.scanner.risk_rating // ""), counts: { critical: ([$f[]|select(.severity=="Critical" and (.false_positive != true))]|length), high: ([$f[]|select(.severity=="High" and (.false_positive != true))]|length), medium: ([$f[]|select(.severity=="Medium" and (.false_positive != true))]|length), low: ([$f[]|select(.severity=="Low" and (.false_positive != true))]|length), false_positive: ([$f[]|select(.false_positive == true)]|length) }, findings: $f }

. as $in | { target: $in.target, assessment_mode: "Static analysis (SAST) with source-verified reachability + source-code hunting -- scanner findings were verified in code and independent source->sink attack chains were hunted and adversarially refuted; unreachable/false items were dropped", triage: $in.verified, attack_surface: { routes: ($in.sast.routes // []) }, surface_stats: { urls: 0, forms: 0, endpoints: (($in.sast.routes // []) | length), active_checks_run: 0 } } | tojson
